name: 05-12-visitor-first-use-brutal-critique

description: Record brutal ordinary visitor first-use critique: map feels like graveyard, tavern entry lacks ritual, NPC chat feels slow, mobile cramped, discovery cards feel empty.

notes: Recorded brutal visitor first-use critique. Main risks: map markers lack meaning, tavern entry lacks doorway ritual, NPC chat waiting/memory affordance is weak, mobile layout may be broken, discovery cards look polished but content-empty, and creator/tool complexity does not match ordinary visitor expectations.
